proves: Cell1 can emit a bounded typed return result packet.
The return packet can reference the frozen schema-consumption evidence.
The return packet can preserve lane-typed authority boundaries.
A Cell0/review classification request can classify the packet for review.
C4 to Cell1 schema intake can consume an accepted proposal packet.
A bounded schema-consumption execution can complete without runtime patch or target modification.

stack_does_not_prove: that a patch target has been selected
that rollback/stop semantics have been verified
stack_now_proves: C4 to Cell1 schema intake was witnessed and frozen.
Cell1 to review/Cell0 handoff-return was witnessed and frozen.
An accepted proposal packet exists as a build-facing input candidate.
